archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Premium B2B Consulting
design_philosophy: McKinsey Digital meets modern SaaS dashboard. The design prioritizes authority, clarity, and structural rigor (PPDT model). It uses a deep navy/charcoal foundation with electric blue accents to create a premium, commanding presence. Generous spacing, optical alignment, and high-contrast data visualization.

headings.usage: Use Outfit for all display and heading text to avoid generic templates while maintaining a clean, premium sans-serif look. Use tracking-tight for H1/H2.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible body text suitable for dense data and conversational AI interfaces.

mono.usage: For data points, scores (1-5 maturity levels), and technical indicators.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2x spacing for breathing room. The Control Room grid for dashboards.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid #374151 with rounded-lg or rounded-xl (subtle roundness max 8px for premium feel)
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadows only. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] for elevated cards.

components.buttons: Premium feel: bg-[#2f81f7] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#58a6ff] transition-all. Subtle inner glow border-t border-white/20.
components.cards: Surface background (#111827), 1px subtle border (#374151), flat, no heavy shadows. Add slight hover lift (-translate-y-1) for interactive cards like Assessment History.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized: bg-transparent border-[#374151] text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2f81f7] focus:border-transparent rounded-md.
components.dialogs: Crystal Glassmorphism overlay: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60. Modal background solid #111827 with 1px border #374151.
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Header text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-[#9CA3AF]. Rows have hover:bg-[#1F2937]. Left aligned text.
components.chat_interface: User messages: bg-[#1F2937]. AI Consultant: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-[#2f81f7] pl-4. Clean, readable width (max-w-3xl).
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. 4-axis radar chart for PPDT model, or layered bar charts. Use chart_palette.
components.phase_indicator: Linear stepper with active phase in #2f81f7 and completed phases with a checkmark. Inactive in #374151.
components.pdf_export: Prominent CTA in dashboard. Button with download icon, text 'Export to PDF'.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have a hover state that changes background or border color.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and cards.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y 4) for dashboard widgets and chat messages.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark blue geometric background for the login and registration pages, overlay with bg-black/50.
Abstract AI technology node to be used as the AI Consultant's avatar in the chat interface.
Coat of arms/building reference for the University of Oulu. Can be used as a subtle image in the 'About' section or footer background.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize a Tailwind project in dark mode by default.
2. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Inter' for body. Update tailwind.config.js to set these font families.
3. Build the Login/Register page using the login_background image with a heavy dark overlay.
4. The Dashboard must use 'The Control Room Grid' strategy (tight gaps, dense data).
5. For the Conversational AI Assessment, implement a chat interface with the ai_avatar.
6. Build a specific component for the PPDT (People, Process, Data, Technology) 1-5 maturity scoring using Radar/Bar charts.
7. Implement an Assessment History Table showing previous scores and a Company Longitudinal Tracking chart (line chart over 6-12 months).
8. Ensure a Phase Progress Indicator is visible during the assessment flow.
9. Add a distinct PDF Export button on the report view.
10. Add a footer referencing 'Product Wellbeing framework' and 'University of Oulu research lineage'.
11. ALL interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
